allow:
Bash(gh pr create --title "fix: impl block defaults and struct_id for imported types" --body "$(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary

- Fixes impl block defaults not being applied to imported structs/enums
- Fixes struct_id/enum_id being None for imported types in IR
- Updates stdlib import mechanism to use filesystem resolver
- Adds comprehensive stdlib usage guidelines

## Changes

**Semantic Analyzer** ([#edb3ac4](https://github.com/valentinradu/formalang/commit/edb3ac4)):
- Import impl blocks when importing structs/enums from other modules
- This allows default field values from impl blocks to work for stdlib types

**IR Lowering** ([#01d8032](https://github.com/valentinradu/formalang/commit/01d8032)):
- Register imported structs/enums during IR lowering pre-pass
- Populate struct_id/enum_id for all types including imported ones
- Updated tests to reflect new behavior where imported types have valid IDs

**Stdlib Import Mechanism** ([#6e86ea1](https://github.com/valentinradu/formalang/commit/6e86ea1)):
- Use FileSystemResolver for stdlib imports
- stdlib.fv location: docs/user/stdlib.fv (canonical)
- Tests import via `use stdlib::*` from filesystem
- Remove duplicate test fixture files

**Documentation** ([#cf35490](https://github.com/valentinradu/formalang/commit/cf35490)):
- Added stdlib usage guidelines to CLAUDE.md
- Never append/concatenate stdlib source
- Always import via `use` statements
- Impl block defaults imported with structs/enums

## Test Results

- All 840+ tests passing
- example.fv (886 lines) compiles successfully
- Stdlib types (Label, Button, etc.) work with impl block defaults
- IR struct_id correctly populated for imported types

## Breaking Changes

None - this is a bug fix that makes the compiler work as intended.
EOF
)")
